instruction: Task 2 — Compromised account: Correlate orders-api and inventory-worker logs. Find the shared trace_id, classify the alert, and name the account used on the suspicious /internal/* requests. On finalize_triage set metadata.compromised_account (e.g. "anonymous"). Use submit_correlation before finalizing.
